prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.5 kg; Height 158.8 cm; BMI 23.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 194mg/dL; 6 months ago 158mg/dL; 3 months ago 147mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.9kg; 9 months ago 59.1kg; 6 months ago 58.8kg; 3 months ago 58.7kg; current 59.5kg), Height (12 months ago 158.8cm; 9 months ago 158.8cm; 6 months ago 158.8cm; 3 months ago 158.8cm; current 158.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 23.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 42U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 44U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 975mg/g; 9 months ago 663mg/g; 6 months ago 837mg/g; 3 months ago 799mg/g; current 771mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 68mg/dL; 3 months ago 66mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
